relevance_criteria: A product is relevant to a query iff it satisfies ALL explicit constraints listed for that query (AND semantics), matched against the raw product attributes from dataset_iphone.csv (kategori_varian, penyimpanan, platform, wilayah_toko substring, kategori_iphone, battery_val >= threshold). Derived deterministically from the real, currently-loaded dataset — no relevance judgment is hand-typed.
